founder.title: The Man of God
founder.name: Rev. (Dr.) Chris Oyakhilome
founder.quote_1: "Your life is the expression of your mind. To change your life, you must change your mind."
founder.quote_2: "We are taking God's presence to the nations of the world and demonstrating the character of the Spirit."
founder.bio_intro: President of LoveWorld Inc., a global ministry with the mandate to take the divine presence to the nations.
founder.bio_body: As a pastor, teacher, healing minister, television host, and best-selling author, Pastor Chris has helped millions of people experience a victorious and purposeful life through the Word of God.
founder.bio_footer: Today, Christ Embassy Angola stands as a vibrant testimony to this global vision, establishing thousands of souls in the reality of their inheritance in Christ Jesus.

partnerships.hero_subtitle: Global Evangelism is powered by partnerships. Join us today to make an eternal impact on billions of lives.
partnerships.sidebar_desc: Select one or more arms to sponsor. Your seed is a miracle in someone's life.
partnerships.step_3_desc: God bless your partnership in the Gospel. We have recorded your transaction in the master system.
partnerships.security_note: Your transactions are protected with bank-standard SSL encryption. Christ Embassy Angola does not store sensitive financial data.
partnerships.error_select_branch: Please select at least one partnership arm.
partnerships.branch_rhapsody_desc: The most translated book in the world, reaching billions in over 7,000 languages.
partnerships.branch_rhapsody_impact: Reaching every nation and city with the gospel through the messenger angel.
partnerships.branch_hschool_desc: Taking God's healing power to the nations through healing crusades.
partnerships.branch_hschool_impact: Millions healed from various diseases and infirmities worldwide.
partnerships.branch_loveworld_desc: Broadcasting the message of hope and life to homes worldwide 24 hours a day.
partnerships.branch_loveworld_impact: Global reaching via satellite and digital, impacting lives across all continents.
partnerships.branch_innercity_desc: Committed to breaking the cycle of poverty and reaching needy children.
partnerships.branch_innercity_impact: Feeding, education and shelter programs for vulnerable children.

donations.success_desc: God bless your life and your seed in the Kingdom abundantly.
donations.panel_desc: Your offerings allow Pastor Chris's message to reach every corner of Angola.
donations.error_fill_form: Please fill in the amount and choose a payment method.

profile.footer_note: Your profile information is used for ministry administrative purposes only.

legal.privacy_update: Christ Embassy Angola • Last updated: March 2025
legal.1_collect_desc: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, phone number, and other contact details when you register on our platform or make a donation.
legal.2_usage_desc: The information collected is used to:
legal.2_usage_1: Provide and manage your access to exclusive content.
legal.2_usage_2: Process your donations and issue confirmations.
legal.2_usage_3: Send communications related to the ministry and events.
legal.2_usage_4: Improve user experience on our platform.
legal.3_security_desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
legal.4_sharing_desc: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personally identifiable information to third parties. We may share data with trusted service partners (such as payment processors) only to the extent necessary to perform requested operations.
legal.5_rights_desc: You have the right to access, correct, or request the deletion of your personal data stored in our systems at any time by contacting our administrative support.
legal.terms_update: Christ Embassy Angola • Last updated: March 2025
legal.t1_accept_desc: By accessing and using the Christ Embassy Angola platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our online services.
legal.t2_content_desc: All content available on this platform, including live streams, videos, texts, and graphics, is the property of Christ Embassy Angola or its licensors and is protected by international copyright laws.
legal.t2_content_extra: Reproduction, distribution, or modification of the content without prior written authorization is strictly prohibited.
legal.t3_conduct_desc: Users commit to using the platform only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe on the rights of third parties or restrict the use and enjoyment of the platform by other users.
legal.t4_donations_desc: All donations and offerings made through the platform are voluntary. Christ Embassy Angola reserves the right to use the funds for its ministerial purposes and charitable projects as it deems appropriate.
legal.t5_modify_desc: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will take effect immediately upon their publication on the platform. Your continued use of the platform after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms of Service.
